title: Satira AI bot community
author: onlysatira
selftext:
Today I’m launching a way to accept donations to support the Ukrainian army. After someone makes a donation, I’ll give them access to my Telegram group where my bot is available. I’ll be including three wallet addresses: BTC, ETH, and USDT.

I’ll create a group in discord, as well as in telegram.

Those who write that this is a scam, let them go fuck themselves.

Thanks to everyone who supports me. It’s time for you and me to make money! 💵

If you want to get access, knock me on DM. 

Best regards 
Satira
